outcome: Asset or Region creates or reopens one project-owned Composition through the canonical ProjectStore; the P1 identity/source collision repair passed independent re-review.

contract.identity: composition and initial layer IDs derive deterministically from the source kind plus fixed-width UTF-16 source ID encoding
contract.assetDimensions: canvas uses Asset intrinsic width and height
contract.regionDimensions: canvas uses Region bounds width and height while retaining its backing Asset selection
contract.initialLayer: one visible unlocked identity-transform layer with a durable Asset or Region source reference
contract.dispatch: composition.create plus workspace.update share one command.batch envelope and one ProjectStore revision
contract.reopen: reserved identity is reused only for the exact one-Layer source graph and source-derived canvas dimensions; an already-active Composition performs no dispatch
contract.runtimeFields: no Blob, object URL, data URL, DOM value, callback, or runtime store field is written to the Project graph

coveredCases: valid reserved Layer source kind mismatch
valid reserved Layer source ID mismatch
getter-backed reserved Layer source without getter execution
valid reserved Composition with an extra Layer
StudioProjectV1 validation after create and reload

gates.name: focused-compose-tests
gates.evidence: 2 files passed; 13 tests passed after P1 repair

gates.name: scope-diff-check
gates.evidence: exit 0; implementation remained inside assigned ownership

adversarialAutopsy.strongestObjection: A valid project could reserve the deterministic Asset Composition identity while its Layer points at a Region and its 128x128 canvas no longer matches the 256x128 Asset.
adversarialAutopsy.repair: Existing-entry inspection now requires exactly one reserved Layer, verifies its id/composition/source through own data descriptors, and compares canvas width/height against the resolved Asset intrinsic dimensions or Region bounds.
adversarialAutopsy.closingProof: validateStudioProject-valid source kind, source ID, dimension, and extra-Layer regressions now return IDENTITY_CONFLICT; reserved Layer source getter read count remains zero; focused compose matrix passes 13/13.

independentReview.finding: readExistingComposition accepted a project-owned reserved Composition without matching reservedLayer.source or canvas dimensions to the resolved request.
independentReview.evidence: Independent rerun passed 13/13 and confirmed exact Composition, Layer, source and dimension matching without accessor execution.

risks: A1-02 still owns Project menu and empty/bootstrap Compose UI; A1-01 intentionally exposes only the project adapter.
A1-03 and A1-04 still own rename/save/reopen UI and portable journey closure.
